Okay, so right now.
I'm gonna talk about solo ad hacks How many you guys know what a solo ad is?
Some of you guys do some of you guys don't all right cool, so we have about half an oh I'm say 60 or 70% yes, and the rest of you guys don't so what a solo ad is is basically so you guys are on my email list right and you're probably on somebody else's email list and a lot of people's email list and The real like feel good like what's the secret about internet marketing right?
It's building email list like when all said done Do you have a big email list you will make money?
You'll be fine for the rest of your life Which is why in the initial training back here on opt-in funnels We spent a lot of time talking about how to build an email list using click funnels to build landing pages and then drive traffic And and all those kind of things and so building an email list is a big secret right now What's cool about it is that a lot of people have email lists out there And if you don't have one yet You want one one of the fastest ways to get one is to go somebody else who already has an email list and pay them to Send an email and promote your squeeze page.
Okay, or your webinar registration page or depending what kind of funnel you have Okay, and so that's one of the ways I built my list so big as I go out and we we find people who already have huge lists of you know 100,000 or million or five million email subscribers And we just simply pay them some money to send down email to their list to promote my squeeze page When they come to my squeeze page or they come to my webinar registration page And they fill out a form now that person is on my email list Okay, so that's kind of that's kind of the the concept what a solo ad is I'm buying an ad a solo ad So a single ad in somebody else's email list, okay?
And that's kind of concept now when to start doing this is kind of There's probably about three different layers on how you can you can do this I'm gonna kind of walk you through each each layer and hopefully it'll help you to understand it So the first the most simple layers I come to Google and I got to find people that have email lists that they will rent to me Okay, and some markets is really easy to find them and for example in the internet marketing world There's like 18 million people who are selling solo ads And the honest truth just so you guys know is that most of them are horrible scam artists I hate saying that because I know a lot of them, but We had one of our one of our students Liz Benny She she ran a webinar and she went and spent five or six hundred dollars on on a solo ad To one of the internet marketing solo ad providers.
She has 700 registrants for webinar and guess how many showed up Anybody guess This is how you know This is a scam when you have 700 people registered and zero people show up She literally had zero not a single person showed up.
So So for me, I steer clear of any of the internet marketing solo ad lists providers I just I think it's all scams So let me show you how I find solo ad providers because there's a better way to do it And so the first level of it is a is kind of figuring out what niche you're in right?
So you need to understand like who are you selling to so for our supplement?
We target people suffering from neuropathy, but that's such a small market There's not a lot of people who have neuropathy email lists and so I had to go a step out So I went from neuropathy like people we found a people have neuropathy But we figured out I think we found out like 50% of people who have diabetes have neuropathy Okay, so I'm back and I started searching for diabetes email lists and there were tons of them out there and all I did is I went to Google I typed in I typed in Diabetes email advertising.
Okay, so for you you would type in waste your market weight loss email advertising.
Let's say or Financial email advertising or you know whatever whatever your market is and sometimes these are easy to find other times It's hard to find so many you got search around But for me when I started doing this for for our supplement I typed in diabetes email advertising and really quick a whole bunch of sites popped up that we actually bought ads on So the first one here is cam.
I don't even know the website Okay, so I clicked on it and took me to this website called Capcom marketing.
They got a bunch of email lists they have email advertising and One of the list is a diabetic list diabetic email list that they advertise so I scroll down here Okay, and they said a daily diabetic recipe diabetic newsletter diabetic news They have a bunch of cool things and down here is their list size Please I've had 31,000 people on their email list on their daily recipe list They've got 29,000 on their news list and then 44,000 on their diabetic newsletter.
Okay, and it shows me right here How much it costs so it's $400 to send an email out to 31,000 people or $325 so they're not here So boom that fast I found a diabetic email list So if I have you know if I want to invest $400 I can test I can drive I can buy an email ad And basically I would just contact them through the contact form They would tell me you know $300 whatever I would send them $300 And then they would say okay.
What email do you want me to send out and I say okay send out this subject line?
Here's the here's the body message about the email.
I click I send that to them They put it into their email out responder They click send in 31,000 people that day will get my email Okay, and it's cool Then they click on link in the email and then they come over to my webinar registration page or my squeeze page and they sign up Okay, and that's kind of what a solo ad is that's how I find a lot of them Okay, the cool thing about finding them through Google like this a lot of times you'll find ones that nobody's ever used before You know they're not being used by a ton of other places so you can come down here is an advertising packages for Diabetic Gory magazine, so I'll click here All right, and these guys sell banner ads on their site So banner advertising so I get 50,000 impressions for $800 I can get email to their 28,000 subscribers for $300 Oh that would need to get both so for $1,000 you get both of those there anyway They have different packages and things like that.
Okay, now for me personally that again, there's a lot of things they have banner ads stuff like that I Traditionally don't buy banner ads this this way through people's websites this direction Unless I found them in similar web.
Do you guys remember during the funnel hacks training?
I showed you how we use similar web So I only buy banner ads on sites that I can reverse engineer.
I know exactly where they are Okay Through similar web But here I love buying email ads this direction if that makes sense So that might just be a personal preference my biggest reason is I don't know what banner ads if they've worked on On this site for my market in the past.
I have no idea so I might test up But for me, I don't test it first always test the email ad first Email ads I love it because again, I send an email it'll go out to in this case 28,000 people But I will find out within Within a day if this email had worked or if it failed like it's really really really quick right which is kind of cool Where's the banner as much it'll take me a month three months before I kind of get enough data to know if it's gonna work or not And I like getting things done fast So I'll test the email list and if it works, then I'll call him back and they came email did did okay for us I know you never this is one of the rules of buying media.
You never tell me did well I'll be like hey the email that they're right.
We almost broke even but you know probably interested in trying out some Some banner ads on your site, so then I'll test banner ads for me personally.
I always test email first I got some friends who are the opposite that they always test banner ads first and they go email But for me personally, I love I just love that the how quick email is and how quick I can do a test for 300 bucks I can find out if this it's this site if the Subscribers on the side are gonna make me money or not.

100,000 and they'll find their 100,000 best like You know hotline people that just subscribe that read an email in the last three days No mail that so results be amazing and then you go okay I want to buy the other 12 million people and the other 12 million people are just horrible I've never opened an email, you know, so I like I like testing small and then Continuing to test small that makes sense.
So I never go from like 12, you know from 100,000 to 12 million I'll do 100,000 and I want 100,000 every single week and as long as keeps working We'll keep running it but as soon as stops and we're gonna cut it now way it gives them more incentive on their side to make Sure that they're not gonna screw over It's kind of sad to say but that's that's the nature of how it works So that's what we typically do ours with these bigger lists and what's cool about that is then you get some some consistency So we know with our list every Monday It's gonna hit, you know one tenth of the world net daily main email list for nurse Ellen So every Monday we know let's get all our split tests up because Monday the app hitting and boom We're gonna see what happens then the next Monday It's the next one tenth of the list and the next one, you know it kind of goes through that and so we have some really consistency It gives us the ability on our side to have support in place and all those things ready and it's just kind of cool So that's one of the tricks about email lists, okay?

Okay, and the nice thing about a list broker is you have some protection with a list broker Okay, if you go and you buy some site you buy site like off here like e-targets and it doesn't do well I don't have a lot of protection.
Okay, if I buy the ad they send it out and doesn't work like that's about it I kind of lost I kind of lost my You know like it either worked or didn't whereas if I work with with the list broker What's cool is that that list broker works with maybe 30 or 40 newsletters They know these newsletters really really well and they know what you know typically what works and what doesn't work And they have a really good pulse on it and if you become their client They want you to keep buying from them and so for example two weeks ago We ran an ad it's one of these newsletters and it completely bombed and luckily we ran it through through dedicated emails calm and I went back to to our list broker and just say hey We buy a lot of emails through you and you know we're gonna keep on a lot of emails But that one was horrible for us it bombed It should you know it shouldn't have done very it shouldn't a lot better and and we said to him And this is the keyword I said I need you to make to do a make good for me Okay, I need you to do a make good You know again if you're going directly to sites They're not gonna give you a make good but you go through a list broker and he knows that you're a serious person He'll do a make good which means he'll say okay what I'm gonna do then is I'm gonna go run your ad on this newsletter over here For free to give you a make good Okay, a lot of times you can go back to the newsletter He can he can argue on your side a lot stronger than you can because he might have 30 or 40 clients he's taking to that newsletter and if one person is about experience He can pull all that business so he's got some leverage there And so the nice thing about working through list brokers again is that you can get them to do make good if there's an issue Okay, when I first started email advertising I didn't really get that and I remember we had this offer and we spent we spent a lot of my like four or five thousand dollars on email ad and it was giving away a free DVD and And luckily for me like I ahead of time I built out a really good like by 15 email follow-up sequence after someone got the DVD Those they kept selling them on the on the next product in our funnel and so we launched it and And give us a five grand.
I think we gave away like I don't know 50 or 60 DVDs from that and It was like pretty much a ball.
They cost me $100 for each DVD I'd given away and I was just like oh I was way more than you know We didn't make our money back at all and I looked at that and I was just like it was huge bomb And we just quit and then like a month later someone asked me to come give a presentation on an email marketing I was like okay, so I was trying to find some stats and stuff and I was shown in that campaign I went through and I started looking at the stats Well, it was cool that people would come through a squeeze page before they got the DVD offer And what I hadn't really noticed is that from that five thousand dollars or whatever we'd spent we have like I don't like 1500-1800 people that it opted in and sure enough day one We only sold 50 DVDs, but over like the 10 to 12 day follow-up sequence We end up selling like three or 400 DVDs and they end up being a campaign we we are more than tripled over on it And what was interesting is that I thought it was a bomb I thought it failed like we walked away from it And I didn't even look at it for a month until I had to do his presentation and luckily I did I said wow We had a smashing success and so we're gonna go back and keep running it But I didn't know that because I didn't have a good follow-up So understand that a lot of times on any kind of advertising especially email advertising You're not gonna win immediately from them clicking and buying it comes from the follow-up sequence as well.
Does that make sense you guys?

That's what they want.
